basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Nagpur Project Research scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Nagpur (AIIMS Nagpur) has released the official Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. AIIMS-NAG/ANAT/CATCH/26-27/11 at https://aiimsnagpur.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the AIIMS Nagpur Project Research Scientist-II (Medical) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 40 years of age with qualifications including MBBS/BAMS/BDS with relevant post-qualification experience, MBBS/ BAMS/ BDS with a postgraduate degree (MD/ MVSc/ MDS/ MPH or equivalent), or MBBS/ BAMS/ BDS/ equivalent with a

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC candidates, Retrenched Government Employees, Departmental Candidates (including projects), and ex-servicemen in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government from time to time. Age relaxation to the extent of services rendered in similar research projects will also be admissible for experienced and skilled persons.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/BAMS/BDS with three years post qualification experience, MBBS/BAMS/BDS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MVSc/MDS/MPH) or any equivalent degree including integrated PG degrees, MBBS/BAMS/BDS/or equivalent with PhD
qualification.details: MBBS/BAMS/BDS with three years post qualification experience MBBS/BAMS/BDS + Post Graduate Degree (MD/MVSc/MDS/MPH) or any equivalent degree including integrated PG degrees MBBS/BAMS/BDS/or equivalent with PhD

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Nagpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC candidates, Retrenched Government Employees, Departmental Candidates (including projects), and ex-servicemen in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government from time to time. Age relaxation to the extent of services rendered in similar research projects will also be admissible for experienced and skilled persons.

AIIMS Nagpur Project Research scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Nagpur Project Research scientist-II (Medical) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Nagpur Project Research scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Nagpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Research scientist-II (Medical) post at AIIMS Nagpur is scheduled for 22nd July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Research scientist-II (Medical) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Research scientist-II (Medical) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 80,000 plus HRA.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have an MBBS/BAMS/BDS degree with three years of post-qualification experience, or a Post Graduate Degree (MD/MVSc/MDS/MPH) or equivalent, or a PhD.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Research scientist-II (Medical) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Research scientist-II (Medical) post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification, Skill Assessment, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to take place?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the AIIMS Nagpur office. The exact address and reporting time will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the position of Project Research scientist-II (Medical) at AIIMS Nagpur is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
